gist.headline: Daily Paper Delivered
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot updated the README with the latest news and community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recently added community apps.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page fresh with the latest community highlights and updates.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee acting as a paperboy or updating a bulletin board, representing the automated daily news update.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny paperboy hat, pinning a fresh news bulletin to a wooden board. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head helps by holding a stack of papers. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny paperboy hat, pinning a fresh news bulletin to a wooden board.
